query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A horizontally oriented abstract image with vertical bands of color in muted lavender, pale green, soft white, and grayish-brown tones. The composition features repeating streaks that span the full frame, bordered by solid lavender margins at top and bottom. A small watermark reading 'skewesme.dpchallenge.com' appears in the lower right corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred abstract photograph with vertical streaks of muted lavender, pale green, soft white, and grayish-brown dissolving into indistinct bands, creating an ethereal, dreamlike impression. The image deliberately sacrifices all representational detail and recognizable subject matter to atmospheric blur, with colors flattened into low-saturation washes. Solid lavender bars frame the top and bottom, reinforcing the graphic, non-representational quality. A watermark reads 'skewesme.dpchallenge.com' in the lower right corner.
